info.title: Features Service API
info.description:
Manages feature definitions and computes output stats.

## Key Concepts

**Features** define what campaigns can do: inputs (form), outputs (metrics), charts (funnel/breakdown), and entities (detail tabs).

**Stats Registry** (`GET /stats/registry`) — the finite universe of known stats keys. Each key has a label and type (count, rate, currency). Features reference these keys in outputs and charts.

**Stats Endpoints** — features-service computes stats by calling downstream services (email-gateway, runs-service, outlets-service) and returns computed values.

## Feature Definition

```typescript
{
  inputs:   [{ key, label, type, ... }],           // campaign form
  outputs:  [{ key, displayOrder }],                // metrics (validated against registry)
  charts:   [{ type: "funnel-bar", steps: [...] }], // visualizations
  entities: ["leads", "companies", "emails"],       // campaign detail tabs
}
```

slug.description: Unique machine-readable identifier, auto-generated from name (e.g. 'outlet-database-discovery')

signature.description: Deterministic hash of sorted input+output keys — used for idempotent upsert

inputs.description: Input fields for the campaign creation form.

outputs.description: Output metrics — stats keys from the registry with display config. Use GET /stats/registry for labels and types.

charts.description: Chart definitions (funnel-bar, breakdown-bar). At least one of each required.

entities.description: Entity types shown in campaign detail sidebar (e.g. ['leads', 'companies', 'emails'])

brandId.description: Brand that was used for pre-fill

prefilled.description: Map of input key → flattened text value (or null if extraction failed).

PrefillTextResponse.description: Pre-filled values as flat strings, ready for form inputs or workflow inputMapping

brandId.description: Brand that was used for pre-fill

value.description: Extracted value — can be a string, array, or object depending on the field

cached.description: Whether the value was served from cache

sourceUrls.description: URLs from the brand's website used to extract this value

prefilled.description: Map of input key → full extraction result.

PrefillFullResponse.description: Pre-filled values with metadata (cache status, source URLs)

put.description: Idempotent — safe to call on every cold start. Uses a signature (hash of sorted input+output keys) to detect duplicates.

get.summary: Get input definitions for a feature

post.summary: Pre-fill input values for a feature from brand data

brandId.description: Brand that was used for pre-fill

prefilled.description: Map of input key → flattened text value (or null if extraction failed).

oneOf.description: Pre-filled values as flat strings, ready for form inputs or workflow inputMapping

get.description: Returns the complete dictionary of known stats keys with their label and type. Used by the front-end to format and label output columns dynamically.

get.summary: Get computed stats for a feature
get.description: Returns computed stats for a feature's outputs and charts. Optionally grouped by workflowName, brandId, or campaignId. System stats (cost, runs, campaigns, dates) are always included.
Cross-feature stats endpoint for performance dashboards and org overview. Supports groupBy: featureSlug, workflowName, brandId, campaignId.

schema.description: Comma-separated dimensions: featureSlug, workflowName, brandId, campaignId

parameters.description: Comma-separated dimensions: featureSlug, workflowName, brandId, campaignId
parameters.name: groupBy
